scripts.test: bun run test:api && bun run test:cau && bun run test:es && bun run test:crawler
scripts.test:cau: FAIL=0; for f in $(find tests/unit/cau -name '*.test.ts' | sort); do echo "--- $f ---"; timeout 120 bun test "$f" || FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); done; if [ $FAIL -gt 0 ]; then echo "Failed files: $FAIL"; exit 1; fi
scripts.test:api: FAIL=0; for f in $(find tests/unit/api -name '*.test.ts' | sort); do echo "--- $f ---"; timeout 120 bun test "$f" || FAIL=$((FAIL+1)); done; if [ $FAIL -gt 0 ]; then echo "Failed files: $FAIL"; exit 1; fi
scripts.openapi:dump: bun -e 'import("./src/api/app").then(async ({ createApp }) => { const prefix = process.env.HUMANDBS_BACKEND_URL_PREFIX ?? ""; const r = await createApp().request(`${prefix}/docs/openapi.json`); if (r.status !== 200) { console.error(`openapi.json fetch failed: ${r.status}`); process.exit(1); } await Bun.write("/tmp/humandbs-openapi.json", await r.text()); console.log("wrote /tmp/humandbs-openapi.json"); })'
scripts.openapi:lint: bun run openapi:dump && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 REDOCLY_TELEMETRY=off bunx redocly lint --config redocly.yaml /tmp/humandbs-openapi.json
